economic_notes: Natuaqanek Commercial Fishery Cooperative Ltd. is a government business enterprise accounted for under the modified equity method. Crown land forestry operations and fisheries operations are significant revenue sources.
notes: Natuaqanek Commercial Fishery Cooperative Ltd. is consolidated using modified equity method as a government business enterprise. Intangible assets of $13,166,769 represent fishing licences recorded at cost and not amortized. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($14,874,845) + CMHC ($1,930,405) + estimated other government (DFO receivable $2,689,597 noted in AR, Crown land forestry likely provincial) — figure used reflects ISC + CMHC only as clearly identified government transfers. Prior year expenses calculated as total expenditures $15,380,553 plus amortization $1,684,899 plus equity loss $26,288 = $17,091,740. Early Childhood Learning ($280,439), Women's Shelter ($192,226), and Assisted Living ($217,057) are additional program expenditures. Schedules of remuneration for elected and unelected officials are listed in table of contents (pages 36-37) but not visible in provided pages.
